# Vendors (internal)

> **Internal only — not part of the public proposal.**

Companies offering egocentric / first-person video data collection as a
service, e.g. as an alternative or complement to building an in-house
capture device and pipeline. Logged here as plain references only — no
evaluation, comparison, or recommendation has been done yet. Do not copy
any of this (or a future evaluation) into the public website; a
buy-vs-build conclusion belongs in `docs/private/buy-vs-build/`, not
here and not in `index.html`.

## Known references (unreviewed)

- **Toloka** — https://toloka.ai/
  Crowdsourcing/data-labeling platform; has a page pitching egocentric
  video dataset collection specifically.
- **Virdyn VDEgo** — https://www.virdynm.com/vdego-egocentric-video-data-collection-service-at-scale-first-person-vision-product/
  Vendor product page for an egocentric video data collection service.
- **AI Data Labs / ThirdEye** — https://www.instagram.com/p/DXvtk-GGipD/
  Referenced via an Instagram post; not yet reviewed beyond the link
  itself.

Add new vendor references in the same format: name, URL, one neutral
line describing what it is. Save pricing, capability comparisons, and
any recommendation for a separate evaluation note once that work
actually happens.
